mapper.sql: SELECT TBC.ID, TBC.CONTACT_NO, TBC.PARENT_ID, TBC.COMPANY_NAMES, TBC.CUSTOMER_ID, TBC.CUSTOMER_NAME, TBC.SIGN_TIME, TBC.CONTRACT_TYPE, MDD.DICT_LABEL AS contractTypeLabel, TBC.IS_SHIP, TBC.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, TBC.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TBC.EXP_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, TBC.EXP_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TBC.OUTER_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, TBC.OUTER_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TBC.LUXIAO_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, TBC.LUXIAO_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TBC.DEPOSIT_BASIS_CODE, TBC.DEPOSIT_BASIS_NAME, TBC.DEPOSIT_RATIO, TBC.PAY_TYPE, TBC.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TBC.START_TIME, TBC.END_TIME, TBC.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TBC.VALID_BY, TBC.VALID_BY_NAME, TBC.VALID_TIME, TBC.STATUS, CASE TBC.STATUS WHEN '10' THEN '签订' WHEN '20' THEN '生效' ELSE '' END AS statusLabel, TBC.REMARK, TBC.CREATE_BY, TBC.CREATE_BY_NAME, TBC.CREATE_TIME, TBC.UPDATE_BY, TBC.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TBC.UPDATE_TIME, CASE WHEN TBC.PARENT_ID IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS hasChild FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA MDD ON TBC.CONTRACT_TYPE = DICT_VALUE AND MDD.DICT_TYPE = 'CONTRACT_TYPE'
mapper.select:
SELECT TBC.ID, TBC.CONTACT_NO, TBC.PARENT_ID, TBC.COMPANY_NAMES, TBC.CUSTOMER_ID, TBC.CUSTOMER_NAME, TBC.SIGN_TIME, TBC.CONTRACT_TYPE, MDD.DICT_LABEL AS contractTypeLabel, TBC.IS_SHIP, TBC.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, TBC.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TBC.EXP_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, TBC.EXP_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TBC.OUTER_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, TBC.OUTER_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TBC.LUXIAO_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, TBC.LUXIAO_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TBC.DEPOSIT_BASIS_CODE, TBC.DEPOSIT_BASIS_NAME, TBC.DEPOSIT_RATIO, TBC.PAY_TYPE, TBC.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TBC.START_TIME, TBC.END_TIME, TBC.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TBC.VALID_BY, TBC.VALID_BY_NAME, TBC.VALID_TIME, TBC.STATUS, CASE TBC.STATUS WHEN '10' THEN '签订' WHEN '20' THEN '生效' ELSE '' END AS statusLabel, TBC.REMARK, TBC.CREATE_BY, TBC.CREATE_BY_NAME, TBC.CREATE_TIME, TBC.UPDATE_BY, TBC.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TBC.UPDATE_TIME, TBCR.CONTRACT_ID, TBCR.CARGO_NAME, case when sfb.COUNT_NUM is not null and sfb.COUNT_NUM>0 then '是' else '否' end "hasContractFile", CASE WHEN TBC.PARENT_ID IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS hasChild
, CASE WHEN LISTAGG(TO_CHAR(SUB_TBC.CONTACT_NO), '!@#') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY SUB_TBC.CONTACT_NO ) LIKE #{contactNoLike,jdbcType=VARCHAR} THEN '1' ELSE '0' END "isSubMatch0"
, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE ( LISTAGG ( TO_CHAR( SUB_TBCC.COMPANY_ID ), ',' ) WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY SUB_TBCC.COMPANY_ID ), #{companyIdRgx} ) THEN '1' ELSE '0' END "isSubMatch1"
, CASE WHEN LISTAGG(TO_CHAR(SUB_TBC.CUSTOMER_NAME), '!@#') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY SUB_TBC.CUSTOMER_NAME ) LIKE #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} THEN '1' ELSE '0' END "isSubMatch2"
, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE ( LISTAGG ( TO_CHAR( SUB_TBC.CONTRACT_TYPE ), ',' ) WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY SUB_TBC.CONTRACT_TYPE ), #{contractTypeRgx} ) THEN '1' ELSE '0' END "isSubMatch3"
, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE ( LISTAGG ( TO_CHAR( SUB_TBC.STATUS ), ',' ) WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY SUB_TBC.STATUS ), #{statusRgx} ) THEN '1' ELSE '0' END "isSubMatch4"
FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA MDD ON TBC.CONTRACT_TYPE = DICT_VALUE AND MDD.DICT_TYPE = 'CONTRACT_TYPE' LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT SUB_TBC ON TBC.ID = SUB_TBC.PARENT_ID JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT_COMPANY TBCC ON TBC.ID = TBCC.CONTRACT_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT_COMPANY SUB_TBCC ON SUB_TBC.ID = SUB_TBCC.CONTRACT_ID left join ( select SFB.BUSINESS_ID,count(0) COUNT_NUM from SYS_FILE SF left join SYS_FILE_BUSINESS SFB on sf.id = sfb.FILE_ID where sf.BUSINESS_TYPE = 'BUSINESS_CONTRACT_02' group by SFb.BUSINESS_ID) sfb on sfb.BUSINESS_ID = TBC.ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TO_CHAR(REGEXP_REPLACE(RTRIM(XMLCAST(XMLAGG(XMLELEMENT(E, TO_CHAR(CARGO_NAME) || ',') ORDER BY CARGO_NAME) AS CLOB), ','), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1')) CARGO_NAME, CONTRACT_ID FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE GROUP BY CONTRACT_ID ) TBCR ON TBCR.CONTRACT_ID = TBC.ID
TBC.PARENT_ID IS NULL
and ( TBC.CONTACT_NO LIKE #{contactNoLike,jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR SUB_TBC.CONTACT_NO LIKE #{contactNoLike,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
and ( TBCC.COMPANY_ID = #{companyId,jdbcType=BIGINT} OR SUB_TBCC.COMPANY_ID = #{companyId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
and ( TBC.CUSTOMER_NAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{customerName}), '%') OR SUB_TBC.CUSTOMER_NAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{customerName}), '%') )
and ( TBC.CONTRACT_TYPE = #{contractType} OR SUB_TBC.CONTRACT_TYPE = #{contractType} )
and ( TBC.STATUS = #{status} OR TBC.STATUS = #{status} )
and case when sfb.COUNT_NUM is not null and sfb.COUNT_NUM>0 then '是' else '否' end = #{hasContractFile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND TBCR.CARGO_NAME LIKE #{cargoNameLike, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
GROUP BY TBC.ID, TBC.CONTACT_NO, TBC.PARENT_ID, TBC.COMPANY_NAMES, TBC.CUSTOMER_ID, TBC.CUSTOMER_NAME, TBC.SIGN_TIME, TBC.CONTRACT_TYPE, MDD.DICT_LABEL, TBC.IS_SHIP, TBC.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, TBC.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TBC.EXP_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, TBC.EXP_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TBC.OUTER_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, TBC.OUTER_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TBC.LUXIAO_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, TBC.LUXIAO_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TBC.DEPOSIT_BASIS_CODE, TBC.DEPOSIT_BASIS_NAME, TBC.DEPOSIT_RATIO, TBC.PAY_TYPE, TBC.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TBC.START_TIME, TBC.END_TIME, TBC.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TBC.VALID_BY, TBC.VALID_BY_NAME, TBC.VALID_TIME, TBC.STATUS, TBC.REMARK, TBC.CREATE_BY, TBC.CREATE_BY_NAME, TBC.CREATE_TIME, TBC.UPDATE_BY, TBC.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TBC.UPDATE_TIME, TBCR.CONTRACT_ID, sfb.COUNT_NUM, TBCR.CARGO_NAME ORDER BY TBC.CREATE_TIME DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BUS_CONTRACT(ID, CONTACT_NO, PARENT_ID, COMPANY_NAMES, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, SIGN_TIME, CONTRACT_TYPE, IS_SHIP, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, EXP_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, EXP_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, OUTER_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, OUTER_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, LUXIAO_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, LUXIAO_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, DEPOSIT_BASIS_CODE, DEPOSIT_BASIS_NAME, DEPOSIT_RATIO, PAY_TYPE, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, START_TIME, END_TIME, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, VALID_BY, VALID_BY_NAME, VALID_TIME, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contactNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyNames, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{signTime, jdbcType=DATE}, #{contractType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isShip, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{settlementBasisCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{settlementBasisName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expSettlementBasisCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expSettlementBasisName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outerSettlementBasisCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outerSettlementBasisName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{luxiaoSettlementBasisCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{luxiaoSettlementBasisName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{depositBasisCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{depositBasisName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{depositRatio,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{payType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{freeStorageDays, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{startTime, jdbcType=DATE}, #{endTime, jdbcType=DATE}, #{shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{validBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{validByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{validTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now})
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_BUS_CONTRACT SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONTACT_NO = #{contactNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COMPANY_NAMES = #{companyNames,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CUSTOMER_NAME = #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SIGN_TIME = #{signTime,jdbcType=DATE}, CONTRACT_TYPE = #{contractType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_SHIP = #{isShip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE = #{settlementBasisCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXP_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE = #{expSettlementBasisCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME = #{settlementBasisName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXP_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME = #{expSettlementBasisName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OUTER_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE = #{outerSettlementBasisCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OUTER_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME = #{outerSettlementBasisName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LUXIAO_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE = #{luxiaoSettlementBasisCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LUXIAO_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME = #{luxiaoSettlementBasisName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEPOSIT_BASIS_CODE = #{depositBasisCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEPOSIT_BASIS_NAME = #{depositBasisName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEPOSIT_RATIO = #{depositRatio,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, PAY_TYPE = #{payType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS = #{freeStorageDays,jdbcType=BIGINT}, START_TIME = #{startTime,jdbcType=DATE}, END_TIME = #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE}, SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, VALID_BY = #{validBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, VALID_BY_NAME = #{validByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VALID_TIME = #{validTime,jdbcType=DATE}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}

UPDATE T_BUS_CONTRACT SET STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VALID_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, VALID_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ID, MIX_RECORD_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, STOREHOUSE_ID, REGION_ID, MASS_ID, MIX_WEIGHT, CONTRACT_ID, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, REMAIN_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_DETAIL WHERE CONTRACT_ID = #{contractId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT COUNT(0) FROM T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD WHERE TCSD.CONTRACT_ID IN (SELECT TBC.ID FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC WHERE TBC.ID = #{contractId,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: UPDATE T_BUS_CONTRACT SET STATUS = '10', VALID_BY = NULL, VALID_BY_NAME = NULL WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BUS_CONTRACT_CUSTOMER (ID, CONTRACT_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contractId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME || (CASE WHEN (SIGN IS NOT NULL OR SIGN != '') THEN ('(' || SIGN || ')') END ) "CARGO_NAME", WORK_TYPE FROM M_CARGO WHERE CARGO_CODE IN
#{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT TBR.ID, TBR.RATE_ITEM_CODE, TBR.RATE_ITEM_NAME, TBR.SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, TBR.SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, TBR.PROCESS_CODE, TBR.PROCESS_NAME, TBR.CARGO_CODE, TBR.CARGO_NAME || (CASE WHEN (MC.SIGN IS NOT NULL OR MC.SIGN != '') THEN ('(' || MC.SIGN || ')') END ) "CARGO_NAME", TBR.INTE_FORE, TBR.RATE, TBR.TAX_RATE, TBR.MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE1, MDD.DICT_LABEL MEASUREMENT_UNIT_NAME1, TBR.MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE2, TBR.STATUS, TBR.START_DATE, TBR.END_DATE, TBR.REMARK, TBR.EXAMINE_BY, TBR.EXAMINE_BY_NAME, TBR.EXAMINE_TIME, TBR.CREATE_BY, TBR.CREATE_BY_NAME, TBR.CREATE_TIME, TBR.UPDATE_BY, TBR.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TBR.UPDATE_TIME, TBR.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TBR.WORK_TYPE FROM T_BUS_RATE TBR LEFT JOIN M_CARGO MC ON TBR.CARGO_CODE = MC.CARGO_CODE LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA MDD ON MDD.DICT_TYPE = 'UNIT' AND TBR.MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE1 = MDD.DICT_VALUE WHERE TBR.STATUS = '10' AND (#{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} >= START_DATE AND #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} <= END_DATE) AND TBR.RATE_ITEM_CODE = 'MS00240'

SELECT TBT.ID TBT_ID, TBT.START_TIME TBT_START_TIME, TBT.END_TIME TBT_END_TIME, TBT.CREATE_BY TBT_CREATE_BY, TBT.CREATE_BY_NAME TBT_CREATE_BY_NAME, TBT.CREATE_TIME TBT_CREATE_TIME, TBT.UPDATE_BY TBT_UPDATE_BY, TBT.UPDATE_BY_NAME TBT_UPDATE_BY_NAME, TBT.UPDATE_TIME TBT_UPDATE_TIME, TBT_CONTRACT.ID TBT_CONTRACT_ID, TBT_CONTRACT.TRATE_ID TBT_CONTRACT_TRATE_ID, TBT_CONTRACT.CONTRACT_NO TBT_CONTRACT_CONTRACT_NO, TBT_CUSTOMER.ID TBT_CUSTOMER_ID, TBT_CUSTOMER.TRATE_ID TBT_CUSTOMER_TRATE_ID, TBT_CUSTOMER.CUSTOMER_ID TBT_CUSTOMER_CUSTOMER_ID, TBT_CUSTOMER.CUSTOMER_NAME TBT_CUSTOMER_CUSTOMER_NAME, TBTI.ID TBTI_ID, TBTI.TRATE_ID TBTI_TRATE_ID, TBTI.TRADE_TYPE TBTI_TRADE_TYPE, TBTI.IMP_EXP TBTI_IMP_EXP, TBTI.IS_TIERED_RATE TBTI_IS_TIERED_RATE, TBTI.PREFERENTIAL_RATE TBTI_PREFERENTIAL_RATE, TBTI.ORIGIN_ACC_NUMBER TBTI_ORIGIN_ACC_NUMBER, TBTIC.ID TBTIC_ID, TBTIC.TRATE_ITEM_ID TBTIC_TRATE_ITEM_ID, TBTIC.CARGO_CODE TBTIC_CARGO_CODE, TBTIC.CARGO_NAME TBTIC_CARGO_NAME, TBTID.ID TBTID_ID, TBTID.TRATE_ITEM_ID TBTID_TRATE_ITEM_ID, TBTID.BEGIN_TON TBTID_BEGIN_TON, TBTID.END_TON TBTID_END_TON, TBTID.RATE TBTID_RATE FROM T_BUS_TRATE TBT JOIN T_BUS_TRATE_CONTRACT TBT_CONTRACT ON TBT.ID = TBT_CONTRACT.TRATE_ID JOIN T_BUS_TRATE_CUSTOMER TBT_CUSTOMER ON TBT.ID = TBT_CUSTOMER.TRATE_ID JOIN T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM TBTI ON TBT.ID = TBTI.TRATE_ID JOIN T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM_CARGO TBTIC ON TBTI.ID = TBTIC.TRATE_ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM_DETAIL TBTID ON TBTI.ID = TBTID.TRATE_ITEM_ID WHERE TBT.STATUS = '20' AND TBTI.ID IN
#{trateItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT ID, CONTRACT_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT_CUSTOMER WHERE CONTRACT_ID = #{contractId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TBT.ID TBT_ID, TBT.START_TIME TBT_START_TIME, TBT.END_TIME TBT_END_TIME, TBT.CREATE_BY TBT_CREATE_BY, TBT.CREATE_BY_NAME TBT_CREATE_BY_NAME, TBT.CREATE_TIME TBT_CREATE_TIME, TBT.UPDATE_BY TBT_UPDATE_BY, TBT.UPDATE_BY_NAME TBT_UPDATE_BY_NAME, TBT.UPDATE_TIME TBT_UPDATE_TIME, TBT_CONTRACT.ID TBT_CONTRACT_ID, TBT_CONTRACT.TRATE_ID TBT_CONTRACT_TRATE_ID, TBT_CONTRACT.CONTRACT_NO TBT_CONTRACT_CONTRACT_NO, TBT_CUSTOMER.ID TBT_CUSTOMER_ID, TBT_CUSTOMER.TRATE_ID TBT_CUSTOMER_TRATE_ID, TBT_CUSTOMER.CUSTOMER_ID TBT_CUSTOMER_CUSTOMER_ID, TBT_CUSTOMER.CUSTOMER_NAME TBT_CUSTOMER_CUSTOMER_NAME, TBTI.ID TBTI_ID, TBTI.TRATE_ID TBTI_TRATE_ID, TBTI.TRADE_TYPE TBTI_TRADE_TYPE, TBTI.IMP_EXP TBTI_IMP_EXP, TBTI.IS_TIERED_RATE TBTI_IS_TIERED_RATE, TBTI.PREFERENTIAL_RATE TBTI_PREFERENTIAL_RATE, TBTI.ORIGIN_ACC_NUMBER TBTI_ORIGIN_ACC_NUMBER, TBTIC.ID TBTIC_ID, TBTIC.TRATE_ITEM_ID TBTIC_TRATE_ITEM_ID, TBTIC.CARGO_CODE TBTIC_CARGO_CODE, TBTIC.CARGO_NAME TBTIC_CARGO_NAME, TBTID.ID TBTID_ID, TBTID.TRATE_ITEM_ID TBTID_TRATE_ITEM_ID, TBTID.BEGIN_TON TBTID_BEGIN_TON, TBTID.END_TON TBTID_END_TON, TBTID.RATE TBTID_RATE FROM T_BUS_TRATE TBT JOIN T_BUS_TRATE_CONTRACT TBT_CONTRACT ON TBT.ID = TBT_CONTRACT.TRATE_ID JOIN T_BUS_TRATE_CUSTOMER TBT_CUSTOMER ON TBT.ID = TBT_CUSTOMER.TRATE_ID JOIN T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM TBTI ON TBT.ID = TBTI.TRATE_ID JOIN T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM_CARGO TBTIC ON TBTI.ID = TBTIC.TRATE_ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM_DETAIL TBTID ON TBTI.ID = TBTID.TRATE_ITEM_ID WHERE TBT.STATUS = '20' AND TBT_CONTRACT.CONTRACT_NO = #{contractNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TBT_CUSTOMER.CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND TBT.START_TIME <= #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND TBT.END_TIME >= #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND TBTIC.CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT ID, CONTRACT_ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, PAYMENT_TYPE_CODE, PAYMENT_TYPE_NAME, PAYMENT_DAYS, RATE, TAX, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, TYPE, RATE_ID, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TRATE_ITEM_ID, TRATE_ID, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE WHERE CONTRACT_ID = #{contractId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
